name: live-data-command-hero
title: Live Data Command Hero
description: An editable hero block for operational-data products centered on continuity and changing state. Composes KPI Number Morph (three metrics), Data Refresh State, a small Streaming Data Rows subset, and Filter Result Transition across initial/live/filtering/refreshing/partial-update/stale/error/recovery. App-controlled, clearly-fictional demo data. SSR-safe, reduced-motion-safe.
